# Texturb

Texturb is a Korean text utility site for writers, marketers, students, and office workers who need fast browser-based tools for editing, counting, cleaning, and restructuring text.

## Site Focus

- Korean text editing utilities
- Character and word count workflows
- Blog, resume, report, email, SNS, and SEO writing guidance
- Practical text cleanup and formatting tools
- AEO-friendly answers for common writing and document preparation questions

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://www.texturb.com/
- Tools: https://www.texturb.com/tools/
- Blog: https://www.texturb.com/blog/
- Guides: https://www.texturb.com/guides/
- Workflows: https://www.texturb.com/workflows/
- Sitemap: https://www.texturb.com/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://www.texturb.com/feed.xml

## Core Tools

- Character counter: https://www.texturb.com/tools/char-counter/
- Slug generator: https://www.texturb.com/tools/slug-generator/
- Title length checker: https://www.texturb.com/tools/title-length-checker/
- Meta description checker: https://www.texturb.com/tools/meta-description-checker/

## Editorial Notes

Content is written for practical use, not as legal, medical, financial, or professional advice. When official rules, platform limits, or public standards matter, users should verify the current source directly.

## Crawling

Public pages, blog posts, guides, and tools may be crawled for search and answer-engine discovery when crawlers respect robots.txt and canonical URLs.
